title: CHEMISTRY OF THE RARE-EARTHS. PART III.  ESTIMATION OF RARE-EARTHS IN URANIUM MINERALS
author: NIHAR KUMAR DUTT
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A critical re-examination of the various methods for the above separation has been made. The method with the help of ether has been improved upon and made suitable for an accurate separation of the rare-earths from excess of uranium.
steps_raw: A critical re-examination of the various methods for the above separation has been made. The method with the help of ether has been improved upon and made suitable for an accurate separation of the rare-earths from excess of uranium.
